title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 392.430 - Certificates to be approved, when
text:
392.430.  Certificates to be approved, when. — Except as provided in section 392.450, the commission shall approve an application for a certificate of local exchange or interexchange service authority upon a showing by the applicant, and a finding by the commission, after notice and hearing, that the grant of authority is in the public interest.
(L. 1987 H.B. 360)
